title: oenothera contorta var. divaricata
intro: Oenothera contorta var. divaricata, also known as twisted evening primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Oenothera contorta var. divaricata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of twisted evening primrose can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
